steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What letter do you hear when you say 'umbrella'?
When you say 'dog', which letter makes the 'd' sound?
Which letter says 'ssss' like a snake?

steps.title: Anna's Picnic
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. I like apples. I have ten red apples in my bag. The sun is big and bright.

steps.audio_text: Hello! I'm Alex. I have two cats. They love to play with the yellow yarn.

questions.question: How many cats does Alex have?

steps.prompt: Say: I have a red apple.

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
What comes after '9' in counting?
The cat is ___ the box. (Grammar question)

lessons.title: My Family & My Body
lessons.topic: Family, Body Parts, and Personal Descriptions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who helps you with your homework?
questions.hint: He is a part of your family and loves to help.

questions.question_text: Which body part do you use to listen to music?
Who drives you to the park in a car?
questions.hint: He has a driver's license and is tall.

steps.title: My Family
steps.text: This is my family. I have a brother. His name is Max. Max has a big smile and short hair. He likes to play in the park with me.

questions.question: What does Max like to do?

steps.audio_text: My sister has long, brown hair. She loves to draw pictures and paints with bright colors. Her favorite color is blue.

questions.question: What does she love to do?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have a nose and two ears.'
steps.expected_text: i have a nose and two ears

questions.question_text: She ___ two brothers. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'mother'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Your hands help you to hold things.
Where does he play football? (Reading comprehension question)

lessons.title: Animals & School Review
lessons.topic: Farm/Pets, School Bag, Colors, and Emotions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal is known for giving wool?
questions.hint: This animal has a fluffy coat.

questions.question_text: What is the farmer doing at the end of the video?
questions.hint: The farmer moves his hand to say something.

questions.question_text: Which animal is playing in the mud in the video?
questions.hint: This animal loves to roll in the dirt.

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: I am on the farm. I see a brown horse and a yellow chicken. I have a blue school bag. There is an orange in my bag. I like the big red barn!

questions.question: What is in the school bag?

steps.audio_text: At the farm, the friendly farmer showed me the green field. In the field, I saw three white sheep playing happily.

questions.question: How many sheep are playing in the field?

steps.prompt: Say: What animal do you like? (Use 'I like ...')

questions.question_text: I ___ a cat at the farm. (Grammar question)
Which animal lives on a farm? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: The barn is blue.
What color is the big red apple? (Reading comprehension question)
Where is the pencil? It's ___ the school bag.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to lock and unlock things?
What do you walk through to enter a house?
What should you carry if you want to go into a locked room?

steps.title: Mia's Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Mia. I have a big yellow ball. I like to play in the park. My ball is on the grass. I have a friend. His name is Tom. We are happy!

questions.question: What is the color of Mia's ball?
Where does Mia like to play?

steps.audio_text: Hi, I am Lily. I have two fluffy rabbits. They love to eat carrots together in the garden.

questions.question: How many rabbits does Lily have?
What do the rabbits like to eat?

steps.prompt: Say: Tell me your name, how you feel today, and what toy you like.
steps.expected_text: hello my name is emma i am excited i like my teddy bear

questions.question_text: I ___ happy today. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'cat'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A door can open and close.
Ben has a small orange ___. (Reading comprehension question)
